destinations.evidence: Block verification runs heartbeat scheduled checks, scheduled C1-C11 verification, scheduled censorship/obligation verification, and async commitment validation with scheduled-origin bypass for heartbeat targets.

Scheduled verification enforces C1-C10 plus C11 predicate evaluation; FilterResult classifies permanent versus temporary failures and keeps too-early, insufficient-funds, predicate, duplicate-in-batch, database-error, and valid results out of permanent removal.
destinations.snippet: FilterResult::C10InBlockDuplicate => false; FilterResult::C4TooEarly => false; FilterResult::C9InsufficientFunds => false; FilterResult::C11PredicateFalse => false; FilterResult::C11PredicateReverted => false; FilterResult::C11PredicateOutOfGas => false; FilterResult::DatabaseError => false; FilterResult::Valid => false;

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port: parent-state verification covers scheduled constraints and filter results preserve the permanent/temporary distinction.
rationale: The old singleton/window/index consensus checks are superseded by the parent-state C1-C10 verifier and C11 predicate verifier. Heartbeat and predicate-Create candidates refine the same verification surface.
statement: Received blocks containing scheduled transactions must be verified against parent-state Scheduler and RitualWallet constraints C1-C10, custom predicate constraint C11, heartbeat-target bypass rules, and distinct ScheduledConstraintViolation error reporting unless validity constraints are explicitly skipped; block-building filters classify permanent versus temporary scheduled failures without removing temporary predicate, too-early, insufficient-funds, duplicate-in-batch, database-error, or valid results.
suggested_falsification_tests: Block verification fixture with invalid C1-C11 scheduled txs, heartbeat revival txs, and censored due obligations.
summary: Block verification enforces scheduled constraints C1-C11.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Scheduled verifier and block-verification integration tests.
title: Block verification enforces scheduled constraints C1-C11
